title: Kung Pao Chicken Flatbread
description: A spicy chinese flatbread dish made with juicy chicken, crunchy vegetables, and savory sauce.
instructions: Brush both sides of flatbread with sesame oil.
Bake flatbread in the oven for 5-7 minutes or until crispy.
In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through.
Remove chicken from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add ginger, garlic, and crushed red pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add soy sauce to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Return chicken to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Serve chicken on top of crispy flatbread and garnish with scallions and sesame seeds.
